HomePage.noMarketsYet: No markets have been created yet. Check back soon!
HomePage.applicationNoteDesc: Please provide a brief note to the Market Owner (e.g., your house number or name) to verify your residency.
HomePage.signInRequiredDesc: You need to sign in or create an account before you can join a market and start shopping.

ShopperDashboard.addressRequiredFirst: You must set your delivery address before opening a shop.
ShopperDashboard.title: Shopper Dashboard
ShopperDashboard.description: Discover markets and open your own shop.

ShopperDashboard.emailNotificationsDesc: Receive important updates via email (e.g. New Order Received, Order Update, Chats).
ShopperDashboard.pushNotificationsDesc: Receive real-time push notifications on your device.
ShopperDashboard.shopSubmittedDesc: Your shop has been submitted to the Market Owner for approval. You have been granted the Shop Owner role.

ShopperDashboard.requestAccessDesc: Please provide a brief note to the Market Owner (e.g., your house number or name) to verify your residency.
ShopperDashboard.openShopDesc: Select an approved market and submit your shop details.
ShopperDashboard.feedbackSuccessDesc: We appreciate your input and will use it to improve the app.
ShopperDashboard.commentPlaceholder: Any features you'd like to see?

ShopperWallet.topUpDesc: Select a package below to add coins to your wallet. You can pay securely using PromptPay QR.
ShopperWallet.afterPayment: After completing the payment, click the button below to update your balance.

AdminDashboard.manageAll: Manage all markets, shops, and users.
AdminDashboard.ownerEmailNote: If the user doesn't exist, an account will be pre-created for them.
AdminDashboard.noMarketsCreated: No markets have been created yet. Click the button above to get started.
AdminDashboard.noCompletedTransactions: No completed transactions have occurred on the platform yet.
AdminDashboard.noShopsExist: No shops exist in this market yet.

AdminDashboard.selectConversationToView: Select a conversation to view and reply
AdminDashboard.noMainPageAds: No Main Page ads created yet.

AdminDashboard.leaveEmptyKeep: Leave empty to keep existing image

AdminDashboard.searchUsersPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or house number...
AdminDashboard.noAddressesFound: No addresses found for this user.

ShopOwnerDashboard.declineCancelDesc: Let the shopper know why you cannot accept the cancellation request.
ShopOwnerDashboard.declineReasonPlaceholder: e.g., The food is already cooked.
ShopOwnerDashboard.feedbackSuccessDesc: We appreciate your input and will use it to improve the app.
ShopOwnerDashboard.commentPlaceholder: Any features you'd like to see?
ShopOwnerDashboard.manageProducts: Manage your products and active orders.
ShopOwnerDashboard.shopPendingDesc: Your shop {name} is currently waiting for the Market Owner to approve it. You will not be able to add products until it is approved.
ShopOwnerDashboard.noOptionsAdded: No options added. Product will not have selectable choices.
ShopOwnerDashboard.noProductsYet: You haven't added any products yet.
ShopOwnerDashboard.clickAddProduct: Click "+ Add Product" to get started.
ShopOwnerDashboard.waitingForShopperToAccept: Waiting for Shopper to Accept Delivery
ShopOwnerDashboard.selectConversation: Select a conversation to start chatting
ShopOwnerDashboard.askShopperScanQr: Ask the shopper to scan this code from their dashboard to complete the delivery.
ShopOwnerDashboard.sureDeleteConversation: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation? This action cannot be undone.
ShopOwnerDashboard.sureDeleteProduct: Are you sure you want to delete this product? This action cannot be undone.
ShopOwnerDashboard.sureDeleteShop: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this shop and all of its active products? Historical orders and reviews will remain intact. This action cannot be undone.
ShopOwnerDashboard.needCoins: You need {coins} coins to promote this product. You only have {balance} coins.
ShopOwnerDashboard.promoteProductDesc: Get more visibility by promoting your product to the top of the market page!
ShopOwnerDashboard.openShopDesc: Select an approved market and submit your shop details.

MarketOwnerDashboard.manageMarkets: Manage your markets and review new shops.
MarketOwnerDashboard.noMarketsAssigned: You haven't been assigned to any markets yet. Contact an Admin to assign you a market before you can create shops.
MarketOwnerDashboard.statusWaitingForShopper: Status: Waiting for shopper to revise.
MarketOwnerDashboard.noActiveShops: No active shops currently in your markets.
MarketOwnerDashboard.provideFeedback: Provide feedback so the {target} knows what to fix before you can approve their request.
MarketOwnerDashboard.feedbackPlaceholder: e.g. Please provide a clearer cover image...

Checkout.emptyCartDesc: Looks like you haven't added anything to your cart yet.
Checkout.orderPlacedDesc: The shop owners have been notified and are preparing your items.
Checkout.noDeliveryAddressSet: You don't have a delivery address set.
Checkout.addAddressLink: Please go to your dashboard to add one.
Checkout.selectOrAddAddress: Please select or add a delivery address.
Checkout.crossVillageError: You can only place orders from shops within your own village's market. Please update your delivery address or remove items from other villages.

MarketShopping.signInPromptDesc: You must be signed in to access this feature. Would you like to sign in now?

WelcomeModal.title: Welcome to Tarad Moo Bann!
WelcomeModal.description: Discover local shops and order directly from your neighbors.

Shopping.noWhatsUpToday: There are no products available in your village today.

Shopping.noOtherMarkets: There are no other markets available right now.
Shopping.signInPromptDesc: You must be signed in to enter a market. Would you like to sign in now?

NotificationPrompt.enableDesc: Get instant alerts when your order status changes or when you receive a new message.

ChatWidget.replySoon: We usually reply within a few hours.
ChatWidget.sendToStart: Send a message to start a conversation.

ShopperShopChatModal.sendToStartShop: Send a message to start a conversation with the shop owner.

Notifications.newOrderBody:
You have a new order from {shopperName}.

Delivery Address:
{deliveryAddress}

Items Ordered:
{itemsList}

Total Amount: ฿{totalAmount}
Notifications.cancelRequestedBody: {shopperName} has requested to cancel their order ({orderId}).
Notifications.cancelAcceptedBody: {shopName} has accepted your order cancellation request.
Notifications.cancelDeclinedBody: {shopName} has declined your cancellation request. The order is still being prepared.
Notifications.shopApprovedBody: Congratulations! Your shop {shopName} has been approved by the market owner.
Notifications.shopReviseBody: The market owner has requested a revision for your shop {shopName}. Please check your dashboard.
Notifications.membershipActiveBody: Your membership for {marketName} is now active!
Notifications.newShopBody: {ownerName} has requested to open a shop '{shopName}' in your market.
Notifications.newMemberBody: {userName} has requested to join your market '{marketName}'.
Notifications.membershipApprovedBody: Your request to join {marketName} has been approved!
Notifications.membershipReviseBody: The market owner has requested a revision to your membership request for {marketName}.
